caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses speaks against a solid black background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved blouse featuring small red floral patterns and an ornate embroidered neckline. A thin black necklace is visible around her neck, and a small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small gold circular logo is accompanied by the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains the sole subject, gesturing with her hands as she talks. In the initial stage, her hands are lowered and out of view. As the clip progresses, she raises her hands to emphasize her points, moving them in a fluid motion in front of her chest. Her facial expression remains engaged and expressive, with her mouth open as she speaks across all captured moments.
